_comment: All trades + EOD snapshots. The day_0_baseline is the starting reference for cumulative P&L math. Each EOD snapshot under daily_snapshots is required for next-day day-over-day calculations.

day_0_baseline.note: Day 0 baseline — bot becomes active Monday 2026-05-11.

trades.catalyst: Google I/O 2026 — Gemini models, AI Mode in Search, agentic AI
trades.reasoning: Swing long. Extreme oversold (Stoch K 0.06) within full SMA bull stack, plus Google I/O catalyst. Setup GOOGL-2026-05-20, approved via Discord 2026-05-20.
trades._backfill_note: Recorded by 2026-05-21 market-open routine. GOOGL filled 2026-05-20 ~09:51 ET; the executing routine committed open_positions.md (git d875313) but did not write this trade to trade_log.json. Backfilled here for record integrity.

weekly_trade_count._comment: Resets every Monday 00:00 ET. Used to enforce max-3-trades-per-week rule.

confidence_calibration._comment: predicted-confidence-bucket -> {sample_size, wins, losses}. Empty until we have closed trades.

daily_snapshots.notes: Full schedule fired today (pre-market, market-open, midday, EOD all ran). 0 trades, 0 positions, P&L $0.00 (0.00%). Day-trade close step had nothing to close. AMZN-2026-05-15 setup proposed pre-market (confidence 6/10, swing long $264-$265.50, R:R 3.0:1) — Approved: NO held into the close; price drifted $267.21 (pre-mkt) → $261.30 (open) → $263.13 (midday) → $263.56 (EOD), never reached entry zone after open and never approved. NVDA Setup #1 STALE confirmed (price $228.29 EOD, prior zone $206-210 fully outrun; 5/20 earnings binary risk). MSFT Setup #2 PASS held; SMA 20 reclaim ($423.39 vs $417.47) sustained through close = 1 of 2 re-arm conditions met for Monday's pre-market re-evaluation, MACD cross still pending. Infra: ta package install fix held (setuptools+wheel upgrade before pip install -r requirements.txt) — no degraded steps today. RuFlo MCP unavailable (file-only mode) — no vector recall / pattern storage. Discord webhooks still unprovisioned in cloud host — brief logged to memory/pending_discord_updates.md.
